zone_description: Entry and social zone directly visible from main door serving guests and family gathering in Tamil Nadu homes
privacy_penetration_rule: Visitor from verandah can see into bedroom or kitchen — public zone boundary is breached
typical_tn_arrangement: North-facing TN homes place verandah full width along road with living behind and dining to one side forming L-shape public zone

zone_description: Social reception area facing south road with deeper verandah overhang to shield afternoon sun in hot months
privacy_penetration_rule: Guest at verandah sees directly into bedroom through poorly placed door — zone privacy completely compromised
typical_tn_arrangement: South-facing 2BHK has deeper verandah 1.8m minimum with living set back from sun and dining adjacent near kitchen side

zone_description: Morning-sun reception zone with verandah receiving east light and living positioned for day-long natural illumination
privacy_penetration_rule: East light enters bedroom instead of living — public zone loses its primary daylight advantage on this facing
typical_tn_arrangement: East-facing TN homes maximize morning light in verandah and living with dining alongside creating bright public zone

zone_description: Protected entry zone with verandah shielded from harsh western sun by overhang or jali screen in Tamil Nadu practice
privacy_penetration_rule: Unshielded west verandah makes public zone uncomfortably hot — guests and family avoid using it in afternoons
typical_tn_arrangement: West-facing 3BHK verandah has deep overhang or perforated screen with living behind protected from direct western sun

zone_description: Grand reception zone in 4BHK with spacious verandah wide living and formal dining for large family gatherings
privacy_penetration_rule: Bedroom corridor visible from living in large home — public zone exposes private wing to all visitors
typical_tn_arrangement: Premium 4BHK north-facing homes have wide verandah with double main door opening to spacious living with formal dining room separate

zone_description: Extended public zone including internal courtyard for light and ventilation in traditional Tamil Nadu house layouts
privacy_penetration_rule: Courtyard visible from bedroom creates privacy breach — public daylight zone extends into private sleeping area
typical_tn_arrangement: Traditional TN homes center courtyard within public zone connecting verandah living and dining around the open-to-sky mutram space

zone_description: Buffer zone between public and private areas containing sacred transitional and storage spaces in TN residential plans
privacy_penetration_rule: Pooja room accessible from kitchen or toilet — sacred space contaminated by service zone adjacency
typical_tn_arrangement: 1BHK minimal semi-private zone is usually a small pooja niche near living room with no separate passage needed

zone_description: Transitional spaces forming threshold between guest-accessible living and family-only bedroom wing in the house
privacy_penetration_rule: Passage connects kitchen directly to bedroom skipping transition — service traffic intrudes on private zone
typical_tn_arrangement: 2BHK uses short passage from living to bedrooms with pooja niche at passage entrance as sacred transition marker

zone_description: Well-defined corridor zone with pooja room and staircase acting as privacy gradient between public and private wings
privacy_penetration_rule: Staircase opens directly into bedroom — upper floor private zone accessible without any transitional buffer
typical_tn_arrangement: 3BHK north-facing layout places passage along central spine with pooja at northeast corner and staircase near passage end

zone_description: Generous transitional wing with dedicated pooja room wide passage and storage marking clear zone boundaries
privacy_penetration_rule: No defined transition space — guest walks from living directly into bedroom corridor without privacy gradient
typical_tn_arrangement: Premium 4BHK dedicates passage wing with pooja room at start of bedroom corridor and staircase at end for vertical circulation

zone_description: Compact transitional elements in small plot layout where dedicated corridor may be minimized to save floor area
privacy_penetration_rule: No transition between zones forces bedroom door to face living directly — every door opening reveals private life
typical_tn_arrangement: South-facing compact TN homes use minimal passage with pooja alcove as architectural cue marking entry to private wing

zone_description: Eastern-facing transitional zone benefits from morning light in pooja area enhancing prayer experience per vastu
privacy_penetration_rule: Pooja room on west side misses morning light — spiritual atmosphere diminished contradicting east-facing advantage
typical_tn_arrangement: East-facing TN homes position pooja at northeast of passage receiving first morning sunlight ideal for dawn prayers and rituals

zone_description: Family sleeping quarters with attached bathroom accessible only through living room or passage for complete privacy
privacy_penetration_rule: Bedroom visible or accessible from verandah or kitchen — sleeping area loses all privacy from visitors and staff
typical_tn_arrangement: 1BHK has single bedroom with common toilet positioned away from kitchen behind living room for basic privacy

zone_description: Two-bedroom private wing with master attached bath and shared common toilet forming self-contained sleeping quarter
privacy_penetration_rule: Both bedrooms accessible from kitchen passage — cooking noise and staff movement disturb sleeping occupants
typical_tn_arrangement: North-facing 2BHK places bedrooms on south and west sides per vastu with toilet between them away from northeast

zone_description: Two-bedroom cluster with southwest master per vastu and attached toilet for privacy in south-facing TN home layout
privacy_penetration_rule: Bedrooms on north side of south-plot expose private zone to road noise and visitor sightline from entry approach
typical_tn_arrangement: South-facing 2BHK positions bedrooms deeper into plot away from road with master in southwest for stability per vastu

zone_description: Three-bedroom private wing with dedicated passage serving as bedroom corridor in standard 3BHK Tamil Nadu layouts
privacy_penetration_rule: Third bedroom door on living wall creates three doors facing guests — private zone boundary is destroyed
typical_tn_arrangement: 3BHK TN layout clusters all bedrooms off central passage with master at passage end for maximum quiet and privacy

zone_description: Four-bedroom private wing forming complete family quarter with individual toilet access in premium 4BHK houses
privacy_penetration_rule: Four bedroom doors visible from any public space — entire private wing exposed to casual visitor observation
typical_tn_arrangement: Premium 4BHK uses L-shaped or parallel passage serving all bedrooms with master suite at quietest wing end in TN practice

zone_description: East-facing private zone positioned on west side of plot away from morning entry activity for sleeping tranquility
privacy_penetration_rule: Bedrooms on east side receive morning light and entry noise — occupants woken by early visitor doorbell activity
typical_tn_arrangement: East-facing 2BHK pushes bedrooms to west and south walls ensuring quiet sleeping away from active morning entry zone

zone_description: West-facing private zone with bedrooms shielded from afternoon sun by thicker walls or buffer spaces for comfort
privacy_penetration_rule: Bedrooms with large west windows overheat in afternoon — private zone becomes uninhabitable during TN summer
typical_tn_arrangement: West-facing 3BHK places bedrooms on east and south with corridor acting as thermal buffer against west wall heat gain

zone_description: Cooking washing and sanitation cluster forming contained service pod away from living and sleeping zones in TN homes
privacy_penetration_rule: Kitchen directly adjacent to bedroom — cooking odors smoke and service staff noise enter sleeping area
typical_tn_arrangement: 1BHK service zone is compact kitchen with adjacent common toilet positioned in southeast per vastu fire corner placement

zone_description: Self-contained service wing with kitchen utility and common toilet linked by service passage in 2BHK TN layouts
privacy_penetration_rule: Service activities visible from main entry — cooking and washing seen by visitors approaching the front door
typical_tn_arrangement: North-facing 2BHK places kitchen in southeast with utility behind and common toilet accessible from living side passage

zone_description: Kitchen cluster in southeast corner with dedicated service entrance allowing domestic help access without main door
privacy_penetration_rule: Service entrance opens near bedroom wing — delivery persons and maid access path crosses private zone boundary
typical_tn_arrangement: South-facing 3BHK kitchen in southeast with service door on east side allowing maid entry without passing through living area

zone_description: Extended service zone with store room for provisions and vessels forming complete back-of-house in larger TN homes
privacy_penetration_rule: Store room accessible from bedroom corridor — service zone extends into private wing violating zone separation
typical_tn_arrangement: Larger TN homes cluster kitchen utility store and service toilet in southeast corner with internal service passage connecting them

zone_description: East-facing service zone benefits from morning light in kitchen with utility on rear for service entrance access
privacy_penetration_rule: Kitchen on west wall receives harsh afternoon sun creating excessive heat in already hot cooking environment
typical_tn_arrangement: East-facing TN homes position kitchen in southeast receiving pleasant morning cooking light with utility behind on south wall

zone_description: West-facing service zone kitchen positioned away from hot west wall with buffer utility between kitchen and sun
privacy_penetration_rule: Kitchen on west wall without buffer — afternoon cooking in west-sun-heated kitchen is unbearable in TN climate
typical_tn_arrangement: West-facing TN homes use utility room as thermal buffer between kitchen and west wall keeping cooking zone cooler in afternoon

zone_description: Premium service pod in 4BHK with large kitchen walk-in store and separate service toilet for domestic staff use
privacy_penetration_rule: Domestic staff must use family toilet — no dedicated service sanitation creates hygiene and social boundary issue
typical_tn_arrangement: 4BHK TN homes feature large L-shaped kitchen with island utility room walk-in pantry and service toilet as complete pod

zone_description: Sacred and vertical circulation spaces serving as architectural thresholds between zones in Tamil Nadu house design
privacy_penetration_rule: No transitional space means abrupt zone change — walking from living directly into bedroom without spatial cue
typical_tn_arrangement: Small TN homes use pooja niche at passage start and staircase at passage end as bookend transitional elements

zone_description: Expanded transitional system with courtyard as central breathing space between all zones in traditional TN architecture
privacy_penetration_rule: Courtyard enclosed or converted to room — house loses its breathing space and natural ventilation chimney effect
typical_tn_arrangement: Traditional TN homes use courtyard as central transitional space with pooja alongside and staircase wrapping around its edge

zone_description: Simple corridor serving as sole transitional element between living and bedroom wing in compact urban TN apartments
privacy_penetration_rule: No corridor means bedroom opens directly into living — visual and acoustic privacy severely compromised
typical_tn_arrangement: Compact 2BHK apartments in Chennai use minimal 0.9m passage connecting living to two bedrooms as basic zone separator

zone_description: North-facing transitional zone with pooja in northeast passage along north wall and staircase accessing upper floor
privacy_penetration_rule: Pooja room displaced from northeast loses vastu significance — transitional zone lacks its sacred anchor element
typical_tn_arrangement: North-facing 3BHK places pooja at northeast end of passage with staircase at south end creating sacred-secular gradient

zone_description: Arrival sequence from plot boundary to house threshold forming the first impression zone for all Tamil Nadu homes
privacy_penetration_rule: No defined arrival sequence — visitor steps from road directly into living room without spatial preparation
typical_tn_arrangement: Small TN homes have compressed entry of gate-step-verandah forming rapid transition from street to semi-public reception

zone_description: Extended arrival experience with pathway and car porch between gate and verandah on larger Tamil Nadu residential plots
privacy_penetration_rule: Long blank pathway with no visual focus — arrival feels institutional rather than welcoming residential approach
typical_tn_arrangement: North-facing 3BHK and 4BHK have gate-pathway-car porch-verandah sequence along north boundary with garden on approach

zone_description: South-facing entry sequence needs sun protection elements along arrival path to make comfortable approach for visitors
privacy_penetration_rule: Unshaded south approach makes entry zone uncomfortably hot — visitors arrive sweating and first impression suffers
typical_tn_arrangement: South-facing TN homes add pergola or tree canopy along approach path with deep verandah overhang sheltering entry zone

zone_description: Compact entry sequence for narrow plots where car porch may be omitted and gate leads directly to verandah steps
privacy_penetration_rule: No verandah on compact plot — visitor steps from gate directly to main door with zero spatial transition
typical_tn_arrangement: Compact 1BHK on narrow TN plots has gate opening directly to small verandah with just enough space for shoe removal

zone_description: Fire egress routes ensuring all rooms have two-hop maximum path to external exit per NBC residential fire safety codes
privacy_penetration_rule: Bedroom has single exit through living — if living is fire source occupant is trapped with no alternate escape
typical_tn_arrangement: Small TN homes rely on kitchen service door as secondary exit with bedroom window as emergency egress per NBC compliance

zone_description: Multi-floor emergency circulation ensuring upper floor occupants can reach ground exit within NBC prescribed travel distance
privacy_penetration_rule: Staircase terminates inside living room — fire in living blocks both normal and emergency exit from upper floors
typical_tn_arrangement: Multi-story TN homes need staircase terminating at external ground door with kitchen service exit as alternate emergency path

zone_description: Upper floor emergency zone with staircase as primary vertical egress and window emergency exits from all bedrooms
privacy_penetration_rule: No window in upper bedroom — occupant trapped on burning floor with single staircase exit blocked by fire
typical_tn_arrangement: Upper floors in TN homes require every bedroom to have window on external wall for fire rescue access per NBC Part 4 fire code

zone_description: Standard 1BHK public zone combining verandah living and compact dining into unified social area for space efficiency
privacy_penetration_rule: Public zone too small in 1BHK makes home feel cramped — visitors crowd tiny living area during social occasions
typical_tn_arrangement: South-facing 1BHK maximizes public zone width along road side with living-dining combined and verandah as sun buffer

zone_description: North-facing 3BHK private zone with bedrooms on south and west maintaining distance from north road noise and entry
privacy_penetration_rule: Bedroom on north road side exposed to traffic noise and headlights — sleeping quality severely compromised
typical_tn_arrangement: North-facing 3BHK clusters bedrooms on south wall with master in southwest and common toilet between bedrooms accessible via passage

zone_description: North-facing 2BHK service zone in southeast with kitchen window facing east for morning cooking light advantage
privacy_penetration_rule: Kitchen without east window loses morning light — darker cooking environment needs artificial lighting all day
typical_tn_arrangement: East-facing 2BHK positions kitchen window toward east for maximum morning light with utility on south side behind kitchen

zone_description: West-facing transitional elements with pooja shielded from west wall heat and passage ventilated from courtyard side
privacy_penetration_rule: Passage on west wall becomes heat corridor — transitional space uncomfortable during afternoon in TN summer months
typical_tn_arrangement: West-facing TN homes position passage on interior away from west wall with pooja at northeast end receiving indirect light

zone_description: East-facing arrival with morning sun welcoming visitors along approach path considered auspicious in Tamil tradition
privacy_penetration_rule: Entry faces west instead of east — loses auspicious morning light arrival and faces harsh afternoon sun instead
typical_tn_arrangement: East-facing TN entry sequence has tulasi madam at gate kolam space before verandah and morning sun illuminating threshold

zone_description: West-facing arrival sequence with sun protection screens and deep overhang to make afternoon entry zone comfortable
privacy_penetration_rule: Unshielded west entry blinds visitors with setting sun — uncomfortable approach and poor first impression of home
typical_tn_arrangement: West-facing TN homes add jali screen or pergola along approach with deep verandah and tinted glass to manage sun glare

zone_description: East-facing 3BHK public zone with morning-lit verandah and living creating bright welcoming social atmosphere
privacy_penetration_rule: Living room in shadow on east-facing plot — fails to capitalize on primary daylight advantage of east orientation
typical_tn_arrangement: East-facing 3BHK places full-width verandah on east with living behind receiving morning light through large openings

zone_description: West-facing 2BHK bedrooms shielded from west sun with thicker walls or utility buffer on west side for comfort
privacy_penetration_rule: Bedroom on west wall with large window — afternoon sun turns room into oven during April to July in Tamil Nadu
typical_tn_arrangement: West-facing 2BHK uses utility or store room as buffer on west wall protecting bedrooms from afternoon heat gain

zone_description: South-facing 3BHK service zone with kitchen on east wall and service exit on south for delivery and maid access
privacy_penetration_rule: Service entrance path crosses bedroom wing approach — maid access disrupts private zone boundary integrity
typical_tn_arrangement: South-facing 3BHK keeps service zone in southeast with service door on east wall sheltered from south sun for comfortable access

zone_description: Ground floor emergency circuit connecting all zones to at least two external exits per NBC fire safety standards
privacy_penetration_rule: Emergency route passes through bedroom — acceptable only during evacuation but door must remain accessible always
typical_tn_arrangement: Ground floor TN homes use main door plus kitchen service door as two exits with passage connecting all rooms to both egress points

zone_description: South-facing transitional zone with pooja in northeast and passage shielded from direct south sun exposure
privacy_penetration_rule: Passage aligned with south entry allows direct visual axis from door to bedroom end — privacy of sleeping zone compromised
typical_tn_arrangement: South-facing 3BHK offsets passage from main axis with pooja room at northeast corner creating L-turn that blocks direct sightline to bedrooms

zone_description: West-facing 2BHK public zone with verandah screened from afternoon sun using jali or louvered panels for comfort
privacy_penetration_rule: West sun glare makes verandah unusable — public zone effectively shrinks to living room only in afternoon hours
typical_tn_arrangement: West-facing 2BHK uses deep verandah with perforated concrete jali screen filtering afternoon sun while maintaining air flow

zone_description: North-facing 4BHK private zone on south and west sides with thick walls and courtyard buffer against road noise
privacy_penetration_rule: Any bedroom door visible from living or verandah breaks private zone enclosure — each door must open only onto passage
typical_tn_arrangement: Premium 4BHK north-facing has L-shaped bedroom wing on south and west with wide passage and each room opening only off this private corridor
